summary: Frontend E2E testing complete for SPARTANS GROWTH LEAGUE. All major flows working: auth, dashboard, daily check-in (confetti + achievement modal), sidebar nav to all pages, prospect create + status-to-won, followup create + mark done, attendance modal, challenges (weekly/monthly + join + create), leaderboard (view toggle + team view), profile (10 badges rendered), admin analytics + role dropdowns, member correctly redirected away from /admin, logout, mobile bottom nav visible at 390px.

design_issues.screen: Attendance modal / Prospects status / Followup date
issues: Uses browser-native <input type=date> and native <select> elements instead of shadcn Calendar / Select components — styling is inconsistent with the premium glass/dark theme. Not blocking but breaks visual polish.

action_items: Consider swapping native date inputs and native <select> dropdowns for shadcn Calendar/Select to match premium dark theme (Attendance modal, Followup date, Prospect status).
critical_code_review_comments: Auth flow correctly stores JWT in localStorage as fallback and works when cookies dropped — verified by successful cross-domain login and full CRUD.
All interactive elements expose kebab-case data-testid consistently — great for testability.
RBAC enforced client-side: /admin redirects non-super_admin users to /.
Daily check-in idempotency: button becomes disabled after use (attribute present after click).
Native browser date/select controls used — inconsistent with premium glass UI theme.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Prospect_1 (marked won) and TEST_Call Sarah followup (marked done) as test data during flow validation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 15 requested frontend flows verified end-to-end against public URL. Only cosmetic design feedback about native date/select controls. No critical or functional issues found.
